calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Bill Ford, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
No appearance by defendant Stephon Bradly, a/k/a Stephon Davin Bradly, a/k/a Stephen Bradley.
Default was entered against defendant on September 30, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on May 3, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, and against the Defaulted Defendant Stephon Bradly, a/k/a Stephon Davin Bradly, a/k/a Stephen Bradley as follows:

Defendant Stephon Bradly, a/k/a Stephon Davin Bradly, a/k/a Stephen Bradley is enjoined and restrained from being within 150 yards or any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 526.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
